summary: Iteration 125 - Testimonial Social Proof Nudge + Email Send Log UI testing complete. All features verified and working correctly. Fixed backend route ordering issue for /api/sequences/email-log endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Backend route /api/sequences/email-log was placed after parameterized routes (/:seqId/enrollments, /:id) causing 404 errors. Moved to before parameterized routes.
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented: portfolio-leave-review-link, testimonial-nudge-card, sequences-tabs, tab-sequences, tab-send-log, send-log-tab
Email log table shows correct columns: Sent, Client, Email type, Recipient, Opened
Pagination controls (log-prev-page, log-next-page) only appear when totalPages > 1 - correct behavior
test_credentials: Email: bookingtest@test.com, Password: password123, userId: cmn0umxwx0000k8sy48g5le5u
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 125 features verified: (1) TASK A.1 - PublicPortfolio.tsx empty state has 'Get in touch to share your experience' link with data-testid='portfolio-leave-review-link' below the main 'Get in touch' CTA. (2) TASK A.2 - PortfolioSettings.tsx empty state has 'Build social proof first' testimonial nudge card with data-testid='testimonial-nudge-card' above the upload area in Settings > Brand > Portfolio section. (3) TASK B.1 - Backend GET /api/sequences/email-log returns { logs, total, page, totalPages } correctly. (4) TASK B.2 - SequencesDashboard has tabs with data-testid='sequences-tabs' containing 'Sequences' and 'Send Log' tabs. (5) TASK B.3 - Send Log tab shows email log table with data-testid='send-log-tab'. (6) TASK B.4 - Table has columns: Sent, Client, Email type, Recipient, Opened. (7) TASK B.5 - Pagination controls (log-prev-page, log-next-page) appear only when totalPages > 1. (8) TASK B.6 - Sequences tab shows 'Built-in Sequences' with Client Onboarding and Quote Follow-Up sequences.

TASK_A1_PUBLIC_PORTFOLIO_REVIEW_LINK.details: Empty state shows 'Get in touch to share your experience →' link with data-testid='portfolio-leave-review-link'

TASK_A2_TESTIMONIAL_NUDGE_CARD.details: Settings > Brand > Portfolio section shows 'Build social proof first' nudge card with data-testid='testimonial-nudge-card'

TASK_B1_EMAIL_LOG_API.details: GET /api/sequences/email-log returns { logs: [...], total: 1, page: 1, totalPages: 1 }

TASK_B2_SEQUENCES_TABS.details: data-testid='sequences-tabs' found with 'Sequences' and 'Send Log' tabs

TASK_B3_SEND_LOG_TAB.details: data-testid='send-log-tab' content found with email log table

TASK_B4_TABLE_COLUMNS.details: Table headers: Sent, Client, Email type, Recipient, Opened

TASK_B5_PAGINATION.details: Pagination controls hidden when only 1 page (correct behavior)

TASK_B6_SEQUENCES_TAB.details: 'Built-in Sequences' section visible with Client Onboarding and Quote Follow-Up

bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Route was defined after parameterized routes (/:seqId/enrollments, /:id) which matched 'email-log' as a parameter
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved /email-log route before parameterized routes in sequences.ts
